---
title: "Pathway summary"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---


```{python}
import pandas as pd

from utils import plot_NES_heatmap_with_significance,plot_pathway_enrichment_heatmap, prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways
```


```{python}
ORA = pd.read_csv("../results/pathway/concat/concat_ORA.csv")
GSEA = pd.read_csv("../results/pathway/concat/concat_GSEA.csv")
```

```{python}
ORA_ALL = ORA[ORA['direction']=='ALL']
ORA_UP = ORA[ORA['direction']=='UP']
ORA_DOWN = ORA[ORA['direction']=='DOWN']
```

```{python}
ora_GO_all = prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways(ORA,db='GO',p_value_col='Adjusted P-value')
ora_GO_up = prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways(ORA_UP,db='GO',p_value_col='Adjusted P-value')
ora_GO_down = prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways(ORA_DOWN,db='GO',p_value_col='Adjusted P-value')

gsea_GO = prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways(GSEA,db='GO')
gsea_HM = prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways(GSEA,db='HM')
gsea_KEGG = prepare_df_for_top_N_pathways(GSEA,db='KEGG')
```

::: panel-tabset

## ALL
```{python}
#| column: page
plot_pathway_enrichment_heatmap(ora_GO_all)
```

## UP
```{python}
#| column: page
plot_pathway_enrichment_heatmap(ora_GO_up)
```

## DOWN
```{python}
#| column: page
plot_pathway_enrichment_heatmap(ora_GO_down)
```
:::

::: panel-tabset

## GO
```{python}
#| column: page
plot_NES_heatmap_with_significance(gsea_GO)
```

## Hallmark
```{python}
#| column: page
plot_NES_heatmap_with_significance(gsea_HM)
```

## KEGG
```{python}
#| column: page
plot_NES_heatmap_with_significance(gsea_KEGG)
```
:::
